description_long: This is a large, black plastic garbage bag with a glossy, reflective surface that catches and scatters light, creating bright highlights. The bag is tightly closed at the top with a visible knot, causing the upper portion to gather and crinkle. Its body is rounded and bulging, suggesting it is filled with various contents, and the surface shows subtle irregularities and creases typical of a full trash bag. The material appears opaque, preventing any view of the interior or its contents. There are no visible labels, logos, or markings on the exterior. The bag is shown resting upright, as if placed on the ground in an urban environment.
description: A large, glossy black plastic garbage bag, tightly knotted at the top and bulging with contents, with no visible labels or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded, bulging body and the tightly knotted top with pronounced surface reflections.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing more of the bag's left side, with the knot and surface creases still prominent.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the bag's fullness and the way the light reflects off the curved surface.
description_view_3: Another angled view highlighting the right side, with the knot and glossy finish clearly visible.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: bulging and moderately overfilled, with taut, rounded sides and visible surface tension
